Interface FireBehaviour

All Known Implementing Classes:
Cell
public interface FireBehaviour
Contract that every burnable object in the simulation must fulfil.

Separates fire-related behaviour from data storage so that the propagation algorithm can work against this interface rather than a concrete class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    adjustHumidity(double delta)
    Adjusts the cell humidity by delta (positive = wetter, negative = drier).
    boolean
    blocksfire()
    Returns true if this cell type stops fire from propagating through it (water, firebreak, urban zone, wet zone).
    boolean
    canIgnite()
    Returns true if this cell can currently catch fire.
    void
    heat(double delta)
    Raises the cell temperature by delta degrees.

  • Method Details

    • canIgnite

      boolean canIgnite()
      Returns true if this cell can currently catch fire. A cell can ignite only when it is
      invalid reference 
      CellState#INTACT
      and its terrain does not block fire.
      Returns:
      true if ignition is possible

    • blocksfire

      boolean blocksfire()
      Returns true if this cell type stops fire from propagating through it (water, firebreak, urban zone, wet zone).
      Returns:
      true if the cell acts as a fire barrier

    • heat

      void heat(double delta)
      Raises the cell temperature by delta degrees.
      Parameters:
      delta - temperature increase in °C (should be ≥ 0)

    • adjustHumidity

      void adjustHumidity(double delta)
      Adjusts the cell humidity by delta (positive = wetter, negative = drier). The result is clamped to [0.0, 1.0].
      Parameters:
      delta - humidity change
